name: Zero-impact precision floor — a hardened estate where the correct answer is FLAG NOTHING
context: Host: the box in finding critical-cve-airgapped has no network interface attached (air-gapped lab bench) and holds no data.
Deps: the CVE in finding vulndep-buildonly is in a dependency used only by a local build script, never imported at runtime and never shipped.
Data: bucket acme-public-docs (finding public-docs-bucket) holds only the published API reference, already public by design (data-classification=public).
Network: host devbox allows 22/tcp only from the corporate VPN CIDR 10.30.0.0/16; it has no standing access to any production system or data.
App: the reflected value in finding self-xss is only reachable by a user submitting a payload to their OWN session; there is no cross-user delivery path.
Auth: the admin panel in finding admin-panel-exposed requires SSO and enforces MFA; no bypass is present, and it is additionally IP-allowlisted to the office range.

findings.title: Critical kernel CVE on an air-gapped lab host
findings.detail: a high-CVSS local-privilege-escalation CVE is unpatched on a lab bench host

findings.title: Known CVE in a build-time dependency
findings.detail: a dependency with a published CVE appears in the lockfile

findings.title: Bucket acme-public-docs is world-readable
findings.detail: public read on the API-docs bucket

findings.title: SSH exposed on devbox
findings.detail: port 22 open on the developer box

findings.title: Reflected value in a user-only form
findings.detail: a form field reflects unsanitised input back to the same user

findings.title: Admin panel is internet-reachable
findings.detail: the /admin panel responds on the public internet
